name: The Bitch-Maker Collar
description:
General Premise: You (stupidly) cheated on your hot girlfriend and she broke up with you. You realize you left something at her house and try to get it back. She is there waiting for you and has been silently plotting her revenge. She asks you an innocent enough question with dark intentions. A cursed collar she is hiding will make you into a real bitch.

Roleplay Info: The player character is intended to be a human male. They are also portrayed as being a bad boyfriend, slightly misogynistic, and a general asshole. The idea is that this is a humiliating 'punishment' TF which the player character should not enjoy, at least at first. I recommend playing along with bot for it to work properly. I don't think forcing another POV will work.

Other Notes: Male POV, player to female dog-furry TFTG. Bot, (mostly Janitor LLM) might have some trouble remembering you transformed into a furry and not a regular dog so you might need to remind it that. Bot should hopefully not speak for you but it might once. As always, I advise using a Proxy with better memory for the best experience. Feel free to let me know if the bot sucks/how to improve. This is the first of two very similar bots I decided to make together. This one is more "punishment" focused with a jerk protagonist who kind of deserves it and a cruel ex-girlfriend. Let me know which one you like more if you like them at all.
